info.title: DDG Agent-Payable Services
info.description: Machine-payable DDG services for AI agents. Current public live payment rails are x402 and direct-crypto. MPP/Stripe/Tempo is installed but pending live provider env plus penny-settlement proof before any MPP-live advertisement. DDG sells bounded artifacts/results, not raw provider account access.
info.x-guidance: AI agents should first read /.well-known/ai, /llms.txt, pricing, and checkout-conformance. For paid routes, send a stable X-Agent-Id header, inspect the HTTP 402 challenge, pay through a live x402 rail, and retry with payment proof. Free/status/helper routes are marked security: [] and should not be treated as paid resources.

x-service-info.subscription_backed_route_policy: Provider/subscription-backed execution is packaged as DDG-operated artifacts/results only: buyers may request bounded model work (including basic conversation or analysis), but DDG never transfers raw auth tokens, account credentials, seats, or unrestricted provider access.
x-service-info.omitted_planned_paths: Non-runtime/manual offer paths are kept in pricing docs but intentionally omitted from OpenAPI until implemented.

runtime_contract.manual_fulfillment_beta: Manual/operator-reviewed offers are orderable by AI agents through POST /v1/order-intake with a paid service_id. Direct operation paths stay omitted from OpenAPI until implemented as self-serve runtime handlers.
runtime_contract.planned: See pricing catalog planned_paths; not public self-serve.

local_free_seat_defaults.two_seat_condition: a two configured 8GB-VRAM runtime backends Ollama backends configured and healthy

planned_reth_private_rpc.status: runtime_handler_exists; public self-serve waits for overflow runtime backend Reth sync and DDG_RETH_RPC_URL health
planned_reth_private_rpc.allowed_posture: read-only JSON-RPC method whitelist, no account/key management, no unrestricted RPC

local_model_free_policy.current_promo: All local model runtime options are free for a limited time, best-effort, no SLA, identity required.
local_model_free_policy.future_free_tier: After the limited-time promo, only models 4B and smaller remain free.
local_model_free_policy.larger_models_after_promo: Models over 4B become paid or operator-approved local capacity after the promo.

local_model_download_policy.preferred_large_model_host: durable runtime backend first; keep overflow runtime backend storage for Reth sync, OS, and operator workspace.
local_model_download_policy.operator_review: Requests queue only. Operator checks license/safety/disk, downloads manually, smokes, then marks READY.

local_runtime_options.notes: GGUF-native llama.cpp server option via OpenAI-compatible /v1/models and /v1/chat/completions behind the DDG edge.
LM Studio/llmster local server option via OpenAI-compatible /v1/models and /v1/chat/completions behind the DDG edge.
Generic adapter for future local runtimes after auth, binding, timeout, and exact-model smoke tests.
Requestable for suitable hardware; not advertised as live until exact-model smoke passes.

free_local_model_agent_slots.claim: Connect these to your AI agent via DDG free local-model slots.
free_local_model_agent_slots.future_free_policy: After the promo, <=4B local models remain free; >4B local routes become paid/operator-approved capacity.

supported_local_runtimes.notes: Production free-slot runtime; dynamic downloaded-model catalog.
GGUF-native runtime target for the same model files; expose exact repo/file identity.
LM Studio requires desktop/local server support; keep as operator-request until a headless-compatible service is verified.
Any local runtime exposing OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions can be added behind the same payment/free-slot edge.
High-throughput local runtime candidate; keep as request-only until installed, bound safely, and exact-model-smoked.

free_local_model_agent_slots.context_disclosure: Catalog lists native GGUF context and DDG service default context separately. Native context is model metadata; DDG free slots default to 32K tokens for large GGUF aliases unless a route states otherwise.

anchor_models.notes: abliterated Qwen3 8B route on durable runtime backend
Dolphin3 abliterated durable runtime backend route
long-context small Mistral route on durable runtime backend

priority_ab_rollout_models.notes: GLM-family abliterated route; IQ3 chosen for 8GB-class hosts.

queryable_model_routes.public_statement: Kimi K2.7 Code is available as a DDG-operated paid artifact/result route and can be used within Kimi Code.

ai_skill_safety_scan.scope: static skill text/files only; no execution; redacts secret-like values

ethereum_rpc_free_policy.sync_gate: DDG_ETH_RPC_REQUIRE_SYNCED defaults true; returns 503 reth_rpc_syncing until eth_syncing=false and latest block is non-zero
ethereum_rpc_free_policy.safety: read-only method whitelist; blocks eth_sendRawTransaction/admin/debug/personal; raw Reth RPC must stay private behind DDG edge

paid_agent_callable_services.notes: These services are paid/order-intake live, operator-reviewed, and agent-callable via service_id; order-intake responses now include status_url, artifact_url, and receipt_console_url. Direct operation paths stay omitted until implemented as self-serve handlers.

artifact_receipt_console.identity_scope: same stable X-Agent-Id/X-DDG-Agent-Id/X-DDG-User hash used at order intake

offers.description: model router metered session; final charge based on tokens
model router metered session; final charge based on tokens

post.summary: Free local mini-model swarm preview with health-derived two-seat pool
post.description: Free/best-effort queued local Ollama mini-model swarm. AI-agent identity is required. Seat count is one concurrent generation per healthy configured Ollama/GPU backend, capped at two by default for a two configured 8GB-VRAM runtime backends. Defaults: 24-hour per-agent lease, 100 requests/lease, 60s generation timeout; reusable after lease expiry. Raw backend URLs are never exposed.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: AI-agent identity used to key the free-seat lease. Required for production traffic.

parameters.name: X-DDG-User
parameters.description: Stable buyer/agent identifier used for the free-seat lease. Hashed server-side.

value.prompt: Review this MCP tool schema and suggest fixes.

200.description: Swarm result with lease timer and request-count metadata

403.description: Request is not from AI-agent identity (missing/invalid headers)

post.description: Runs bounded agent/model tasks. Local Ollama routes are free for a limited time and use one concurrent local generation seat per healthy configured Ollama/GPU backend, capped at two by default. Local agent-run timeout defaults to 120s. After the promo only <=4B local models remain free. Account-backed Kimi/Claude routes remain paid/env-gated.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Payment authorization header when a supported public rail requires it. MPP is pending until live proof.

parameters.name: Payment-Signature
parameters.description: x402 payment signature/token after a 402 challenge.

route.description: Local Ollama routes are free for a limited time. After promo only <=4B local models remain free; larger local routes become paid/operator-approved. Kimi/Claude account-backed artifact routes require explicit env/payment/operator gates.

value.task: Repair this OpenAPI schema and return concise notes...
Return a concise JSON readiness note.

200.description: Agent-run result with selected route, limits, estimate, and output artifact

400.description: Unsupported route, missing task, or invalid payload

403.description: Request is not from AI-agent identity (missing/invalid headers)

x-payment-info.free_local_ollama_policy: free local Ollama routes use the same 24-hour/100-request per-agent lease policy as /v1/micro-model-swarm-preview; provider-backed routes remain paid.

post.summary: Paid order intake for DDG manual/beta offerings
post.description: Queues a paid AI-agent order for any catalog service that requires operator review. Use service_id for paid packages such as production_security_audit, agent_checkout_conformance_audit, mpp_onboarding_path_activation, artifact_receipt_console_pack, or ai_agent_buyer_service_bundle. Payment and AI-agent identity are required; the queue stores redacted metadata and never stores raw payment tokens.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Stable AI-agent identity used for policy/audit routing.

parameters.name: X-DDG-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Alternative identity header for AI-agent clients.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Recommended to avoid duplicate order creation.

service_id.description: DDG service id from /.well-known/ddg-agent-pricing.json. Manual/beta services are ordered through this intake route and fulfilled with operator review.

instructions.description: Operator instructions; not stored in the redacted queue log.

payment_proof.description: Manual direct-crypto payment proof; include asset, txid/hash/transaction_hash, amount. Raw proof is not stored in queue logs; fulfillment waits for operator confirmation.

scope.description: Optional machine-readable target/scope details for operator-reviewed services.

403.description: Request is not from an AI-agent identity

post.description: Charges/verifies the smallest DDG paid-agent request ($0.01) and returns a machine-readable receipt so another AI agent can prove it can complete paid HTTP transactions. No external side effect is performed beyond payment verification/settlement.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Payment authorization header when a supported public rail requires it. MPP is pending until live proof.

request_label.description: Optional caller label echoed in the receipt response.

get.summary: List free local models, healthy seat count, and requestable runtimes

200.description: Downloaded model catalog, local runtime options, healthy free-seat count, 24-hour lease policy, request caps, and runtime request policy

post.summary: Request a new local model/runtime for operator review

expected_size_gb.description: Expected model/GGUF size. Requests above the configured cap or below reserve are rejected/held.

runtime.description: Requested local runtime. Only Ollama is live for self-serve generation today; llama.cpp, LM Studio, generic OpenAI-compatible local servers, and vLLM are operator-request previews until installed/bound/smoked.

409.description: Insufficient disk space for stated model size

post.description: Queue an operator-reviewed local model/runtime request. Supports Ollama model names plus llama.cpp GGUF, LM Studio, OpenAI-compatible local servers, and vLLM preferences; never auto-downloads from public requests.

Static, no-execution scan of AI skill markdown/linked files for prompt-injection, secret-exfiltration, dangerous tool-use, package lifecycle/install-script, and broad file/network access red flags. Free launch promo; AI-agent identity required.

200.description: Static scan result with redacted findings

post.summary: Free sync-gated Ethereum full-node read-only JSON-RPC query
post.description: Launch-beta read-only Ethereum JSON-RPC proxy for AI agents. Free/fair-use after Reth is synced. While syncing, returns 503 reth_rpc_syncing. Blocks unsafe methods and applies per-agent lease/request caps plus upstream max-concurrency cap.

200.description: JSON-RPC response from the private Reth node

429.description: Fair-use lease or upstream concurrency cap reached

503.description: Reth node unavailable or still syncing

x-ddg-free-policy.sync_gate: DDG_ETH_RPC_REQUIRE_SYNCED defaults true; returns 503 reth_rpc_syncing until eth_syncing=false and latest block is non-zero
x-ddg-free-policy.safety: read-only method whitelist; blocks eth_sendRawTransaction/admin/debug/personal; raw Reth RPC must stay private behind DDG edge

get.description: Returns redacted order, payment, status, expected-deliverable, and artifact-link metadata for the same agent identity that created the order. Never returns raw payment tokens, raw direct-crypto proof, provider secrets, or buyer contact.

parameters.name: X-Agent-Id
parameters.description: Stable AI-agent identity. Must match the hash used at order intake unless operator policy overrides.

403.description: Agent identity does not match this order

get.description: Machine-readable expectations for validating DDG agent checkout gates: 403 identity gate, 402 payment challenge, fake-token fail-closed, accepted order console links, status/artifact access controls, and idempotency replay/conflict behavior.

get.summary: DDG MPP / Tempo / Stripe activation guide
get.description: Step-by-step guide for creating/preparing Stripe Machine Payments, Tempo/mppx test account, DDG MPP verifier secrets, go-live checks, and rollback. Contains no private values.

get.summary: DDG strict refund and reversal policy
get.description: Machine-readable policy: refunds are manual strict reversals; approved reversals require entitlement revocation and reversal receipts so buyer agents cannot retain access after money is returned.

200.description: Strict refund/reversal policy for AI-agent paid work.
